title: salix × rubriformis
intro: Salix × rubriformis, also known as the weeping willow or hybrid willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The bark of the Salix × rubriformis plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, which has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Salix × rubriformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Salix × rubriformis can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
